revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hikowakamikono Shrine
| native_name = 孫若御子神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hikowakamikono Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hikowakamikono Shrine'''|孫若御子神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q85878469|ltq=Q85878469|qid=Q85878469|1=Keidai-Sessha}}
* {{ill|Q9610964|ltq=Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11465292|ltq=Q11465292|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}}
** Series ordinal: 114
** P155: {{ill|Q482065|ltq=Q482065|qid=Q482065|1=Atsuta Shrine}}

** P156: {{ill|Q11669906|ltq=Q11669906|qid=Q11669906|1=Takakurayui Mikoshi Shrine}}
* {{ill|Atsuta Shrine|lt=Atsuta Jingū|ar|أتسوتا جينغو|az|Atsuta məbədi|cs|Svatyně Acuta|de|Atsuta-jingū|en|Atsuta Shrine|eu|Atsuta santutegia|fa|معبد آتسوتا|fr|Atsuta-jingū|hu|Acutai nagyszentély|id|Kuil Atsuta|it|Santuario di Atsuta|ja|熱田神宮|ko|아쓰타 신궁|la|Atsuta Templum|or|ଆତ୍ସୁତା ଶାଳ|pl|Atsuta-jingū|pt|Santuário de Atsuta|simple|Atsuta Shrine|th|ศาลเจ้าอัตสึตะ|tr|Atsuta Tapınağı|uk|Святилище Ацута|zh|熱田神宮|qid=Q482065|1=Atsuta Shrine}}
